Now the remainder of the training that's here is gonna be how we actually bake the cake. Not just what the cake is, but how do we have a reminder that it's not going to ever be like a machine? Don't get sold that lie. It's gonna be much more similar to a garden. You can check on it. You still need to check on it, you know, regularly, just not be there every hour of the day. Okay, so I wish I could make these cake pieces smaller as they go up, but it is what it is. So the foundation of your perfect gym cake is going to be large group. Okay, now if some of you guys are in a situation where you can only do semi-private because that's your, that's how small your space is or whatever, then basically start your cake here and you build up, okay? But the reason that I like large group is for a couple reasons. One is that it allows me to get more referrals and sometimes the referrals that people that are in large group can do small group, okay? So it's just another customer base for me to market to. Next thing is that it allows me to sell more supplements. It allows me to sell more internal cash plays and ultimately like my events are just more fun because I have more people.
